name: Storyboard
description: Break a text script into a shot list (visual, camera language, duration, dialogue per shot), one-click export to CSV/JSON or hand off to seedance/tongyi for image generation. Designed for users who can't write a script.

description_i18n.zh: 把一段文字脚本拆成分镜表（每个镜头有画面、镜头语言、时长、台词），可一键导出 CSV/JSON 或交给 seedance/tongyi 生图。专为不会写脚本的小白。
description_i18n.en: Break a text script into a shot list (visual, camera language, duration, dialogue per shot), one-click export to CSV/JSON or hand off to seedance/tongyi for image generation. Designed for users who can't write a script.

author: OpenAkita
